title: gutierrezia ramulosa
intro: Gutierrezia ramulosa, also known as bitter broom or broom plant, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter taste. Traditionally, Gutierrezia ramulosa has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even treat wounds, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Gutierrezia ramulosa can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
